Off Calendar May-28-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RONG DENG's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Off calendar. Parties have settled.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar May-20-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Alexander Eisner, Esq. 949-551-9000 Shawn Steel Law Firm for Plaintiff.
MAILA D. ACOBA, ESQ. (650) 991-5126 CESARI, WERNER AND MORIARTY for Defendant

ARGUED. Ms. Acoba contests the tentative ruling and argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT RONG DENG's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement.

Defendants Rong Ye Dong and Jacky M. Luo's Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement, Obtain Dismissal of Case, and Enforce Paragraph 14 of the Settlement Agreement is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
